backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming high-confidence implementation of the PayPal donation section in Footer.tsx, referencing the QR code asset and required display elements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key features of each component, page, hook, and data file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities entry with OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, muted, chart, and sidebar colours.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx, titled 'PIP Preparation Tool'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry that configures TanStack Router with seven routes (home, checklist, form-preparation, evidence-helper, assessment-guide, resources, privacy) wrapped in a Layout component containing Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer featuring a donation section with a PayPal QR code image for Danielle Boylan and a support message, followed by privacy notice, DWP disclaimer, quick links, copyright, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with app branding, six desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, a high-contrast mode toggle button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/data/pipActivities.ts: Static data file exporting a typed array of 12 PIP2 activity objects, each containing an id, title, question, plain-English explanation, and an array of guidance tips.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighContrastMode.t: Custom hook that persists a high-contrast mode preference in localStorage and toggles a 'high-contrast' CSS class on the document root element.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic hook for reading and writing a typed value to localStorage, with cross-tab synchronization via the storage event.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since all data is stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a blues-and-greys design system, a high-contrast mode variant, and reusable component classes like nav-link and section-card.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentGuidePage.t: Page component displaying guidance for a PIP disability assessment, including a list of common assessor questions with advice and key tips such as describing worst days and requesting a recording.
frontend/src/pages/ChecklistPage.tsx: Page component presenting a six-step PIP claim checklist with localStorage-persisted completion state, a progress bar, and action links to relevant app sections.
frontend/src/pages/EvidenceHelperPage.ts: A page that lets users track PIP evidence gathering via a checklist and maintain a personal document list, with data persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/FormPreparationPage.t: A page for drafting answers to all PIP2 activity areas, with auto-save to localStorage, progress tracking, and expandable sections with tips.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The landing page featuring a hero section, feature cards linking to the main tool sections (checklist, form prep, evidence, assessment guide), and a disclaimer alert.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyNoticePage.tsx: A privacy notice page explaining that all data is stored only in the browser's localStorage, listing each stored key, and providing a button to clear all saved data.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesPage.tsx: A curated resources page listing official government links, support organisations, benefits calculators, legal aid services, and disability charities relevant to PIP claimants.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Inter, Merriweather), an extended color palette using oklch CSS variables, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the PIP2 Assessment Tool, tracking schema version, existing features (PayPal QR donation footer), pending feature requests (printable PIP2 summary, donation section), and architectural notes.
